MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert Borton, Esq. of HELLER & EHRMAN 772-6498, specially appearing for defendant Ramon Maciel, demurring party
Mercedes A. Gavin, Esq., 464-9841, for plaintiff and opposing party Adeline Rizzo

RULING:
Plaintiff presented a copy of the filed request for dismissal in #606815 to the Court. The Court overruled DEFENDANT RAMON MACIEL'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. Defendant has 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301/CW) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
